name: Free of Pointer not at Start of Buffer
description: The product calls free() on a pointer to heap-allocated memory where the pointer has been moved via arithmetic and no longer references the start of the buffer, causing memory corruption, crashes, or potential code execution.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM(pointer_arithmetic) modifies a pointer originally returned by TRANSFORM(malloc/allocation), then TRANSFORM(free) is called on the modified pointer without restoring it to the original buffer start. Look for pointer movement between allocation and deallocation.
